summary: Excellent soundboard capture of the Utica show with a funky Shakedown‑Minglewood transition and standout Althea and Cassidy performances.
review: The recording delivers crystal‑clear sound that lets the band’s funkiness shine, especially on the seamless Shakedown > Minglewood segue. Reviewers highlight expressive Garcia vocals on Althea and a particularly nice rendition of Cassidy, calling the overall musical experience excellent despite only a partial first set being present.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives 4 stars, praising both the performance (standout jams and vocals) and the excellent soundboard quality; limited data points keep confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review mentions crystal‑clear sound and no technical issues; the digital SBD source provides a clean, balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Smooth transition from Shakedown into Minglewood without a pause, creating a funky, well‑developed jam; overall set feels lively and expressive.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Lyrics slightly strained but delivered coolly; Garcia’s vocal expression noted as very expressive.
band_member_comments.Keys: Reference to Brent era songs (Althea) being among the better tunes, implying strong keyboard contribution.
